title: deepsap-tsjs-nf pipeline parameters
description: Score an existing BAM with DeepSAP's TSJS transformer only (no GSNAP alignment).

input.description: Samplesheet CSV with columns 'sample,bam', or a glob pattern matching BAM/SAM files directly.

fasta.description: Reference FASTA, uncompressed. Must share contig names with every input BAM (GENCODE 'chr1' vs Ensembl '1' is the usual STAR-BAM mismatch).

fai.description: Optional samtools .fai index for --fasta. If omitted, an existing <fasta>.fai sibling is used, otherwise it is built once for the whole batch (never per sample).

outdir.description: Directory the scored BAM, junctions TSV and prediction outputs are published to.

deepsap_sif.description: Path to the local DeepSAP SIF (or an equivalent container reference). No cross-cluster default; set explicitly or via a cluster profile (e.g. conf/puhti.config).

ctmp.description: Persistent HOST directory holding (or to be populated with) the image's own /tmp/83 checkpoint tree. Required -- see README 'The /tmp trap'. No cross-cluster default.

batch.description: --batch. Wrapper default is 32; lower values are also used automatically on a detected CUDA-OOM retry (16, then 8 -- see conf/modules.config).

set_size.description: --set_size. Optional; only meaningful paired with a lowered --batch.

threads.description: --threads. Defaults to the task's allocated CPUs (task.cpus) when unset.

n_reads.description: --n_reads. Only used when score_reads is true.

fp16.description: true passes --fp16, false passes --no-fp16, unset (default) passes neither.

test.description: --test. "Don't perform prediction" -- for a cheap CI/dry-run profile.

help.description: Show the parameter help text and exit.

cluster_options.title: Cluster / scheduler options
cluster_options.description: Site-specific SLURM settings, used by -profile slurm. Each flag is emitted only when its param is set, because clusters differ on whether --account exists and on how GPUs are requested.

account.description: SLURM account (--account). Leave unset on clusters with no accounting.

gpu_partition.description: Partition for the GPU scoring task.

cpu_partition.description: Partition for the light CPU tasks (STAGE_CTMP, PREPARE_REFERENCE). Falls back to gpu_partition when unset.

gpu_gres.description: Value for --gres, e.g. 'gpu:v100:1'. Set to null on clusters that allocate GPUs by partition alone.

gpu_extra.description: Additional sbatch flags appended verbatim to the GPU task.

container_module.description: Environment module(s) to load on the compute node before the container is invoked, e.g. 'apptainer' or 'apptainer/1.3.6'. Colon-separate for several. Needed on clusters where apptainer is not on the default compute-node PATH.
